prompt: Generate a line chart infographic combining the multi-line data visualization structure and legend placement from image 2. Adopt the bold line style, vibrant point markers, and clean background aesthetic found in image 1, including a clear title.
prompt_refined: Generate a new line chart infographic that incorporates the multi-line data visualization structure and vertical legend placement found in image 2. Adopt the bold line style, vibrant, solid circular point markers, and a clean, light background aesthetic with minimal grid lines, all characteristic of image 1. Ensure a clear, prominent title is centered above the chart, similar to image 1.
objects: Vertical legend (positioned to the right of the chart)
